title: sida callitricha
intro: Sida callitricha, also known as the sida or country mallow, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sida callitricha include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from pain and swelling. Sida callitricha can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to address various health issues.
